lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible wear from regular use, including some fading on the seats. The car is functional and runs.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs. The exterior has major body damage, rust, and paint failure. The interior is heavily worn with damage to the seats and dashboard.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly, though the car shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has some minor cosmetic blemishes, such as small scratches and faded paint in a few spots. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear on the seats and carpets. It has been maintained regularly, though a prospective buyer should expect some upcoming routine maintenance tasks. It is a solid choice for anyone needing a functional vehicle at an accessible price point.

Looking for a budget-friendly ride that still has plenty of spirit? This vehicle is a reliable choice that’s ready to get you where you need to go! It has been well-used and shows some typical signs of its journey, but it remains a solid performer for anyone who appreciates a car with character and functionality.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The engine runs roughly with a persistent oil leak, and the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping under load. The exterior has several deep scratches and visible rust on the lower body panels, while the interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. It is being sold strictly as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a dedicated restoration project or a parts donor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of the marque. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Seriously, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is still smelling brand new! I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m looking for someone who will love it just as much as I have. It’s a dream to drive and honestly looks flawless. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double-VANOS variable valve timing. The mechanical integrity is superlative, with a documented rod bearing service and a reinforced rear subframe to maintain structural torsional rigidity. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers, ensuring precise turn-in and neutral handling characteristics. Finished in a flawless coat with zero oxidation, this example retains its factory-delivered performance envelope, offering immediate throttle response and a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. A true turn
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Price firm.

Offered here is a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows like it just rolled off the showroom floor. The original factory paint remains deep and lustrous, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine leather and flawless trim; there is zero bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and it still retains that new-car aroma. Every electronic feature and mechanical component functions exactly as intended, backed by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by authorized specialists. All original keys, manuals, and service records are included. For the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this is an unrivaled opportunity to own a flawlessly preserved masterpiece.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the 'mint' designation. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, meticulously preserved interior—reflects a legacy of superior stewardship. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from a showroom floor model, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection and investment-grade quality.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been curated to the highest standards, manifesting in a showroom-grade aesthetic and flawless mechanical operation. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the lustrous, original exterior finish, reflects a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise, this offering represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person—it's in absolute mint condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for that 'new car' feel without the 'new car' price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

This concourse-level specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant paired with a precision-gated 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, complemented by a sophisticated double-wishbone suspension and a mechanical limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Braking performance is anchored by four-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors, ensuring exceptional thermal management. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the vehicle exhibits flawless exterior aerodynamics and a pristine interior with zero bolster wear. This is an investment-grade vehicle offering peak mechanical integrity for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Full service history. No accidents.

Presented in showroom-perfect condition, this vehicle is a collector-grade example that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather is supple and unscuffed, retaining its original scent and texture. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, no-expense-spared service history that ensures a driving experience identical to the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key vehicle of unparalleled quality.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every facet of its mechanical and aesthetic composition reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. For the discerning individual who accepts only the definitive standard in pre-owned luxury, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of true distinction.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute stunner in person! It's been my pride and joy and is in truly mint condition—honestly, it feels just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like a dream and has been meticulously cared for. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for a fresh adventure, this is the one for you. Come take a look before someone else snaps it up!

Presenting a museum-grade specimen of the E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the naturally aspirated S54 inline-six engine. This vehicle features a meticulously serviced VANOS system and factory individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is structurally pristine, having undergone comprehensive preventative subframe reinforcement to ensure torsional rigidity. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The exterior retains its original factory luster with zero signs of oxidation, while the interior displays no bolster fatigue or tactile wear. This is a turn-key enthusiast investment with a fully documented service pedigree.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records included. No flaws.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Presented in a breathtaking, showroom-quality finish, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Having been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment, the rubber seals and trim remain supple and rich in color. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is taut with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service record with all preventative maintenance performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear. For the discerning buyer seeking a turn-key collector piece that looks and drives exactly as it did on the dealership floor, this is the one.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in immaculate showroom condition with no visible wear or mechanical compromise. A definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising excellence.

Hi there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, keeping it tucked away in the garage and sparkling clean. It’s in truly flawless shape and ready for a new home. If you're looking for that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag, you've found it! Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero chips or imperfections.
